offer: For accounting firms managing 10–20 clients, manual tracking of subscription renewals causes missed payments and client dissatisfaction. We provide automated notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking multiple subscription renewals and anomalies for clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firm advice

Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
